title: Crispy Chinese Anchovy Stir-fry
description: A quick, umami-packed stir-fry featuring crisp anchovy fillets, fragrant aromatics, and a savory sauce, served over warm rice.
instructions: Rinse the dried anchovy fillets under cold water, then pat dry with paper towels.
Warm a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat; add sesame oil and swirl to coat.
Add minced garlic, ginger, and sliced chili to the hot oil; stir-fry for 30 seconds until fragrant.
Add the anchovy fillets to the pan, breaking them up with a wooden spoon, and stir-fry for 2-3 minutes until they start to crisp and brown.
Pour in soy sauce and rice vinegar, then sprinkle sugar; toss to coat the anchovies evenly.
Stir in scallions and optional Sichuan peppercorn; cook for another minute, letting flavors meld.
Remove the pan from heat; let the anchovy mixture rest for 1 minute.
Serve the crispy anchovy stir-fry over a bowl of cooked white rice.
